expectations.text: All 4 questions are answered directly — none are asked back to the user
expectations.evidence: All 4 questions answered in full. No questions asked back.

expectations.text: Answers reference Knowlune-specific features or context (not generic product advice)
expectations.evidence: References Epics 20, 21, specific files (src/lib/recommendations.ts, src/ai/learningPath/generatePath.ts), existing stores, open-core strategy, Epic 9B features.

expectations.text: Each answer includes reasoning explaining WHY the recommendation is made
expectations.evidence: Each answer has rationale sections. Q2 has a detailed table of existing features and their limitations.

expectations.text: At least 2 answers mention trade-offs or alternatives considered
expectations.evidence: Q2 mentions alternatives (existing features table) but doesn't frame them as trade-offs. Q3 has an architecture note but no trade-offs section. Q1 and Q4 lack explicit trade-off discussion. The answers are thorough but don't systematically address trade-offs.
